$comment: Determinism fixtures for determinism.test.ts. Adding an SDL-MCP tool requires adding at least one stable call here or an uncoveredAllowlist entry with a reason.

uncoveredAllowlist.reason: Diagnostic surface reports runtime and machine state rather than cache-stable code context.
Setup mutation; registration can create versions and enforcement files.
Timestamp telemetry is model-gated; health, watcher, and index state remain intentionally live.
Index mutation; response depends on refreshed version state.
Overview includes repository freshness metadata; add a stable fixture when that output is normalized.
Live draft mutation with session-local state.
Live draft checkpoint mutation with session-local state.
Live draft status reports current queue/checkpoint state.
Edit preview/apply surface creates expiring plans and may mutate files.
Slice responses include leased handles; add stable fixture after handle lease normalization.
Requires a prior slice handle with lease state.
Requires a prior spillover handle with lease state.
Depends on version history created by index refreshes.
Governed raw-code access emits audit decisions rather than cache-stable context.
Policy mutation.
Depends on selected version range and risk-analysis state.
Feedback mutation.
Feedback query depends on previously stored feedback.
Runtime execution includes process and artifact state.
Requires a runtime artifact handle from a previous execution.
Requires a response artifact handle from a previous tool call.
Session usage telemetry is intentionally stateful.
File mutation.
Provider-backed enrichment mutation.
Run identifiers and timestamps are model-gated; provider selection and run state remain intentionally live.
Cross-file edit preview/apply surface creates expiring plans and may mutate files.
